children.text: applies for a United States passport (or a renewal thereof), or
applies to be lawfully accorded the privilege of residing permanently in the United States as an immigrant in accordance with the immigration laws,
in the case of a passport applicant, any foreign country in which such individual is residing,

in the case of an individual seeking permanent residence, information with respect to whether such individual is required to file a return of the tax imposed by chapter 1 for such individual’s most recent 3 taxable years, and
such other information as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: Penalty
children.label: c Penalty
children.text: Any individual failing to provide a statement required under subsection (a) shall be subject to a penalty equal to $500 for each such failure, unless it is shown that such failure is due to reasonable cause and not to willful neglect.

children.heading: Information to be provided to Secretary
children.label: d Information to be provided to Secretary

children.text: provide any such statement to the Secretary, and
provide to the Secretary the name (and any other identifying information) of any individual refusing to comply with the provisions of subsection (a).

children.heading: Exemption
children.label: e Exemption
children.text: The Secretary may by regulations exempt any class of individuals from the requirements of this section if he determines that applying this section to such individuals is not necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.
